campaign.name: SMB Simplified
campaign.objective: Drive 30% increase in demo requests and 50% increase in signups among SMB owners within 3 months by positioning Acme Corp as the enterprise-capable yet simple logistics platform
campaign.targetAudience: SMB owners (early-stage to Series A) who are technologists, data scientists, or marketers with 80%+ decision power, managing logistics operations with limited time (<10 hours/week) and budget constraints
campaign.positioning: Enterprise capabilities without enterprise complexity - the only logistics platform that gives you scale features without the bloat, pricing traps, or implementation headaches
keyMessages: Get enterprise-grade features in 30 days or less, not months
One platform. One predictable price. No hidden AI fees
Works with your existing stack - not against it
Built by SMB owners, for SMB owners - no corporate fluff
campaign.timeline: 3 months: Month 1 - awareness + lead capture, Month 2 - nurturing + demo requests, Month 3 - conversion + testimonials

contentPlan.title: The Real Cost of Manual Logistics Operations
contentPlan.purpose: Top-of-funnel awareness highlighting pain points of tool fragmentation and time waste
contentPlan.callToAction: Download the free Tech Stack Audit Checklist

contentPlan.title: How Mid-Size Logistics Companies Are Cutting Costs 25%
contentPlan.purpose: Middle-of-funnel consideration with ROI-focused case study framing

contentPlan.title: Tool Fragmentation: The Silent Killer of SMB Growth
contentPlan.purpose: Build topical authority on integration complexity pain point
contentPlan.callToAction: See How We Connect Your Tools

contentPlan.title: [Similar Company] Reduced Costs 30% in 6 Months
contentPlan.purpose: Bottom-of-funnel proof with specific metrics and timeline

contentPlan.title: SMB Tech Stack Audit Checklist
contentPlan.purpose: Low-friction lead capture (1-2 fields) for progressive profiling

contentPlan.title: Stop Losing Money on Manual Logistics
contentPlan.purpose: High-intent engagement with technical deep dive on ROI tracking

landingPages.headline: Enterprise Features Without Enterprise Complexity
landingPages.subheadline: The logistics platform built for mid-size companies - live in 30 days or less
landingPages.valueProposition: Get the scale and reliability of enterprise logistics software without the bloat, hidden fees, or months of implementation. Trusted by 50+ logistics companies.

landingPages.headline: See Your Potential Savings in 60 Seconds
landingPages.subheadline: Free ROI calculator showing real cost reduction benchmarks for SMBs
landingPages.valueProposition: Most SMBs waste 10+ hours/week on manual logistics. Calculate how much time and money you're losing - and what you could save.

landingPages.headline: Inventory That Moves. Not Dead Stock.
landingPages.subheadline: Predictive forecasting that reduces stockouts by 40%
landingPages.valueProposition: Stop guessing on inventory. Our AI-driven forecasting predicts demand spikes before they happen, reducing stockouts and excess inventory.

landingPages.headline: Works With Your Existing Tools. Not Against Them.
landingPages.subheadline: Connect to Excel, SAP, Oracle, and 100+ apps in one click
landingPages.valueProposition: No more data silos. Our integration-first approach means your logistics software works with your current stack, not forcing you to replace everything.

salesQualifiedHandoff.sqaThreshold: score >= 60 AND demo_booked == true AND email_verified == true
salesQualifiedHandoff.handoffProcess: 1) Lead marked as SQA in CRM 2) Slack notification to #sales-alerts channel 3) AE receives lead within 15 minutes 4) AE reviews lead data (company, use case, budget, timeline) 5) AE calls within 1 hour 6) Sales rep logs call notes and updates lead status
